message:
fix(bootstrap,sdk): improve test clarity and suppress clippy false positives

Bootstrap error.rs:
- Restructure bootstrap_result_with_vec test to use separate assert
  steps (is_ok + unwrap + len check) for clearer failure diagnostics

SDK runtime.rs:
- Replace Duration::from_millis(N_000) with Duration::from_secs(N)
  for readability in 3 timeout/interval test assertions
- Add #[allow(clippy::redundant_clone)] on 3 intentional clone-for-
  verification tests (SupervisorOutcome, HealthTransition) where the
  clone is the behavior under test

Also update beads issue tracking state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
